name: omp-project-time
description: Project time and billable work plugin for OMP.

scripts.build: npm run build:types && npm run build:source && npm run build:vendor && npm run format:dist

annualGrossSalary.description: Annual gross salary. Project Time divides this by working hours and weeks to show the effective paid hourly cost.

workingHoursPerWeek.description: Expected working hours per week used to calculate the effective paid hourly cost.

workingWeeksPerYear.description: Expected working weeks per year. Use fewer than 52 when paid time off reduces working hours.

activeWindowMinutes.description: How long one prompt keeps Project Time active.

refreshIntervalSeconds.description: How often the status text refreshes while the meter is active.

label.description: Lowercase suffix shown in the status line, such as dev.

locale.description: BCP 47 locale used to format Canadian-dollar amounts.

repositoryBilling.description: Optional repository-timesheet JSON. Each GitHub repository maps to a project and billing category; disabled records no timesheet attribution.
